headline: AbbVie Expands European Reach As Investors Weigh Dividend Support
summary: AbbVie received a positive opinion from the European Medicines Agency's CHMP for Boey for glabellar lines and MAVIRET for acute hepatitis C infection, supporting potential approvals in Europe. The company plans to share new oncology data at the upcoming ASCO Annual Meeting and recently reported strong clinical updates in inflammatory bowel disease therapies. These developments highlight AbbVie's expanding presence in aesthetics, antivirals and immunology alongside upcoming oncology...

headline: The Dividend Stocks That Generate $60,000 Tax-Free Inside a Roth (And What They Cost You in a Taxable Account)
summary: Holding a high-yield dividend portfolio in a taxable account at the 24% federal bracket means writing the IRS a $14,400 check every year on $60,000 of income that should have been yours. It repeats annually, forever, on the same dollars you already earned. This series exists because most readers know what a Roth IRA is ... The Dividend Stocks That Generate $60,000 Tax-Free Inside a Roth (And What They Cost You in a Taxable Account)

headline: AbbVie (ABBV): 10 Best Low Risk Stocks to Buy in 2026
summary: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) is one of the best low risk stocks to buy in 2026. On May 5, AbbVie presented 18 abstracts at the 2026 Digestive Disease Week Annual Meeting, highlighting new real-world and clinical trial data for its IBD therapies, Skyrizi (risankizumab) and Rinvoq (upadacitinib). The findings demonstrate the long-term efficacy, safety, and durability […]

headline: HDV: This May Not Be The ETF You Want, But It Could Be The One You Need Right Now
summary: HDV offers defensive exposure with a 2.90% yield, focusing on quality, high-dividend companies with strong moats. Read more on HDV ETF here.

headline: The Smartest Growth Stocks to Invest $10,000 in As Investors Rotate Out of Tech
summary: When investors take a risk-off attitude, stocks with attractive, growing dividends are often their safe-haven option.
